privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.lead: How MHA Jobs handles your personal information.
privacy.shellNote: This is a structural placeholder. The full, reviewed privacy policy is finalised before launch.

collection.title: Information we collect
collection.body: We collect the details you provide to create an account, build a profile, apply to roles, and request support.

use.title: How we use your information
use.body: We use your information to operate the platform, match you to opportunities, and respond to support requests.

resumes.title: Resumes and private files
resumes.body: Resumes are stored privately and shared only with employers whose roles you apply to. They are never made public.

sharing.title: Sharing
sharing.body: We do not sell your data. Employers see candidate information only for applications to their own roles.

rights.title: Your choices
rights.body: You can review and update your information, and contact MHA to ask questions about your data.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.lead: The terms for using the MHA Jobs platform.
terms.shellNote: This is a structural placeholder. The full, reviewed terms are finalised before launch.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of terms
acceptance.body: By using MHA Jobs you agree to these terms and to honest, lawful use of the platform.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.body: You are responsible for the accuracy of your information and for keeping your account secure.

employers.title: Employer approval
employers.body: Employers must be approved by MHA before publishing roles, and must keep listings accurate.

conduct.title: Acceptable use
conduct.body: Do not misuse the platform, misrepresent yourself, or attempt to access data that is not yours.

limitations.title: Service limitations
limitations.body: Job Fit and insights are guidance only and do not guarantee outcomes such as interviews or hires.
